c.d: Whether the app is available and syncs across multiple operating systems like Android, iOS, Windows, Mac, and Web
Variety of note types supported such as text, images, audio, PDF, handwriting, and others
Ability to share notes, collaborate with team members, and co-edit or publish notes
Use of AI to enhance note-taking, such as transcription, summarization, or smart search
Ability to create and edit notes without internet connection
c.s: Inferred from common note app functions

c.d: Ease of use and distraction-free note-taking interface
Features like tags, folders, templates, and version history to organize notes effectively
Free or paid, and any significant pricing tiers affecting user choice
